violations.text: No person in charge with a food safety manager certificate was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the spray bottle was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Per interview of staff, utensils (tongs) are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the shift (every 8 hours). The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The establishment does not have a list of ingredients for their self-service food items (baked goods, hot dogs, taquitos/tornados). Self-service items must have a list of ingredients readily available for consumers. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The floors in the warewashing room has an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
